title: AgroGame Knowledge Base Page
description: Frontmatter schema for docs/<dotted-path>.md pages that document an agrogame package. Validated by scripts/check_docs_coverage.py (#295).

doc_type.description: 'module' = page binds to a Python package; 'topic' = freeform topic page.

references.description: Literature references (free-form citations, e.g. 'FAO-56 (Allen et al. 1998), §3').

key_classes.description: Public class names that must be importable from `module` (e.g. 'WaterParams').

key_events.description: Domain-event class names emitted or consumed by this module.

primary_tests.description: Pytest paths or node-ids that exercise the module (e.g. 'tests/test_soil_water.py' or 'tests/integration/test_realism.py::test_water_balance').

related_adrs.description: Architectural Decision Records relevant to this module (e.g. 'ADR-006').
